name: ateam
description: AgenTeam: Role-based AI team collaboration. Researcher, PM, architect, implementer, test-writer, and reviewer -- orchestrated through a configurable pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Role-based AI team -- research, strategize, design, implement, test, review.
interface.longDescription: AgenTeam organizes AI-assisted development into specialist roles (researcher, pm, architect, implementer, test-writer, reviewer) materialized as Codex-native custom agents. Configure pipelines, write policies, and custom roles via agenteam.yaml.
defaultPrompt: Set up a development team for this project
Run the full pipeline on: add user authentication
Add a security auditor to the team
